---
title: "Childhood exposure to non-persistent endocrine disrupting chemicals and multi-omic profiles: A panel study"
date: 2023-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Multi-omics
  - Endocrine Disruptors
  - Environmental Epidemiology
  - Exposome
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Garlant&eacute;zec R, Audouze K, Bustamante M, Carracedo Á, Chatzi L, Ram&oacute;n Gonz&aacute;lez J, Gra&#382;ulevi&#269;ien&#279; R, Keun H, Lau CE, et al. "Childhood exposure to non-persistent endocrine disrupting chemicals and multi-omic profiles: A panel study." <em>Environment International</em> 173 (2023): 107856, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856"><code>10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Final version
      url: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Code
      url: https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/paper-helix-multiOmics
      icon: fa-brands fa-github
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856
---

## Abstract

Available at the [journal website](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856).

## Important links

- [Published version](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2023.107856)
- [Code repository](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/paper-helix-multiOmics)

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@article{fabbri2023childhood,
  title={Childhood exposure to non-persistent endocrine disrupting chemicals and multi-omic profiles: A panel study},
  author={Fabbri, Lorenzo and Garlant{\'e}zec, Ronan and Audouze, Karine and Bustamante, Mariona and Carracedo, {\'A}ngel and Chatzi, Leda and Ram{\'o}n Gonz{\'a}lez, Juan and Gra{\v{z}}ulevi{\v{c}}ien{\.{e}}, Regina and Keun, Hector and Lau, Chung-Ho E and others},
  journal={Environment International},
  volume={173},
  pages={107856},
  year={2023},
  publisher={Elsevier BV}
}
```
